title: Text Generation Flow
description: TextProvider gateway request construction, message mapping, tool attachment, API call, and response parsing
activity_flow: ACTIVITY: Generate invocation UUID via Str::uuid7()
FORK: [is FakeGateway?] → record prompt via Ai::recordPrompt(prompt)
FORK: [agent uses RemembersConversations AND has participant?] → push RememberConversation middleware
FORK: [agent instanceof HasMiddleware?] → merge agent-defined middleware
DECISION: [agent instanceof Conversational?] → YES: load prior messages from agent.messages() | NO: messages = []
ACTIVITY: Append UserMessage(prompt.prompt, prompt.attachments) to messages
ACTIVITY: Register tool callbacks via textGateway()->onToolInvocation(invoking, invoked)
DECISION: [agent instanceof HasStructuredOutput?] → YES: schema = agent.schema(JsonSchemaTypeFactory) | NO: schema = null
ACTIVITY: Call textGateway()->generateText(provider, model, instructions, messages, tools, schema, options, timeout)
ACTIVITY: buildTextRequestBody(provider, model, instructions, messages, tools, schema, options)
ACTIVITY: mapMessagesToInput(messages, instructions) → iterate messages by role
DECISION: [tools filled?] → YES: mapTools(tools, provider) + set tool_choice='auto'
DECISION: [schema filled?] → YES: buildSchemaFormat(schema) → json_schema format (OpenAI) OR output_config (Anthropic native) OR buildStructuredOutputTool() synthetic tool (Anthropic fallback)
ACTIVITY: Apply provider-specific options (maxTokens, temperature, providerOptions)
ACTIVITY: HTTP POST to API endpoint ('responses' for OpenAI) via withErrorHandling()
DECISION: [data has error OR status='failed'?] → YES: throw AiException | NO: continue
ACTIVITY: extractText(output) → last output content text
ACTIVITY: extractUsage(data) → Usage(inputTokens, outputTokens, cached, reasoning)
ACTIVITY: Create Step(text, toolCalls, [], finishReason, usage, Meta)
ACTIVITY: Push AssistantMessage to messages collection
DECISION: [finishReason == ToolCalls AND filled(toolCalls) AND steps.count < maxSteps?]
ACTIVITY: Fire invokingToolCallback → dispatch InvokingTool event
ACTIVITY: Fire toolInvokedCallback → dispatch ToolInvoked event
ACTIVITY: Create ToolResult(id, name, arguments, result, resultId)
ACTIVITY: continueWithToolResults() → build follow-up body {model, previous_response_id, tool_results_input}
DECISION: [structured?] → YES: return StructuredTextResponse(structuredData, text, combinedUsage, Meta).withToolCallsAndResults().withSteps()
DECISION: [schema filled?] → YES: wrap as StructuredAgentResponse | NO: wrap as AgentResponse
ACTIVITY: Attach toolCallsAndResults, steps to AgentResponse
key_decision_points: Is agent Conversational? → load message history
Are tools provided? → attach mapTools + tool_choice
Is schema provided? → attach schema format (varies by gateway)
Does Anthropic provider support native structured output? → output_config vs synthetic tool
finishReason == ToolCalls AND below maxSteps? → enter tool execution loop
Tool found by name? → execute or skip
Is response structured? → StructuredTextResponse vs TextResponse

key_method_signatures.ParsesTextResponses.processResponse: processResponse(array $data, Provider, bool $structured, array $tools, ?array $schema, Collection $steps, Collection $messages, int $depth, ?int $maxSteps, ...): TextResponse

key_relationships: GeneratesText (trait) uses HasTextGateway to get TextGateway instance
OpenAiGateway uses BuildsTextRequests, MapsMessages, ParsesTextResponses, InvokesTools, MapsTools, MapsAttachments traits
AnthropicGateway uses its own BuildsTextRequests with different schema strategy
ParsesTextResponses::processResponse is recursive (tool loop) until FinishReason::Stop or maxSteps reached
InvokesTools dispatches InvokingTool/ToolInvoked events via callbacks registered by GeneratesText

response_types.TextResponse: text, usage, meta, messages, steps, toolCalls, toolResults
response_types.AgentResponse: invocationId, text, usage, meta, messages, toolCalls, toolResults, steps

important_notes: Tool loop is bounded by options.maxSteps (defaults to round(tools.count * 1.5))
OpenAI uses 'responses' endpoint with previous_response_id for stateful tool continuation
Anthropic uses Messages API; structured output either via output_config (beta) or synthetic 'output_structured_data' tool
Pipeline middleware supports: FakeGateway recording, RememberConversation, custom agent middleware
Events fired: PromptingAgent (pre), InvokingTool (per tool call), ToolInvoked (post tool), AgentPrompted (post completion)
